title: Dr. Sanghamitra Burman | Consultant Eye Surgeon in Bangalore
description: Dr. Sanghamitra Burman is a Consultant Eye Surgeon in Bangalore, India. She specializes in LASIK/laser vision correction, keratoconus treatment, cataract and ICL/refractive lens surgery, corneal transplantation/ keratoplasty, limbal stem cell transplantation, ocular surface disorders and reconstruction.

lenses, Contact Lens fitting Opticals & Pharmacy Frames, Antiglare Lenses, Blue-filter lenses, Eyeglasses, Power Sunglasses Welcome to SightYears Eye Clinic If you are a new visitor, we look forward to meeting you and helping you improve your ocular health. If you are a current patient, thank you once again for allowing us the opportunity to care for your eyes. If you are a new patient looking for one of the best eye doctors in one of the best eye clinics in Bangalore, India, you are in the right place. SightYears Eye Clinic is a private ophthalmology clinic devoted to the innovative and integrative treatment of various eye problems and eye diseases. Dr Sanghamitra Burman , founder and chief consultant ophthalmic surgeon has over 20 years’ experience as an  ophthalmologist and is a well-known cornea specialist, LASIK and cataract surgeon. She is not only a leading eye surgeon in Bangalore, but is also among a handful of cornea specialists with dual fellowships in complex corneal diseases and phaco-refractive surgery from the UK. “Beyond Expectations. Doctor is well experienced and treatment is excellent. Friendly nature. Good facility.” Verified Patient “Excellent doctor! My second time here and always diagnoses the problem. Prompt timing as well. Would definitely recommend her.” Nikhil Hegde “Dr. Sanghamitra is very pleasing and  listens to the patient and summarises the discussion very well and comprehensively. Surely recommend her.” Krithika.
